text:
The 
therapist must document in the clinical record the measurement results 
along with the therapist’s determination of the effectiveness of therapy, or 
lack thereof. 

• For multi-discipline therapy cases, a qualified therapist from each of the 
disciplines must functionally reassess the patient. The therapist must 
document the measurement results which correspond to the therapist’s 
discipline and care plan goals in the clinical record. 
 • The 30-day clock begins with the first therapy
